TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tanzania, title = Tanzania, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tanzania} }

S.FORM: Tanzania hya' ga cyux maki' tay 6 00 S, 35 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 947,300 sq km (maki' tay 31ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 885,800 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 61,500 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 52,482,726. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga43.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga 37.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 19%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Dodoma. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 26 na tay spayat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga John Magufuli, aring ryax 5 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Tanzania hya' ga cyux maki' tay 6 00 S, 35 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 947,300 sq km (maki' tay 31ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 885,800 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 61,500 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 52,482,726. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga43.70% , lhlahuy hya' ga 37.30%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 19%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Dodoma. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 26 na tay spayat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga John Magufuli, aring ryax 5 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: tanzania ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj * ** s~…ē, ** ** e na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a**.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a *o*oma. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj s~…ēpajat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a *ońßn ma…£u*uli, ariŇč rjax * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
